def negative_tempfile_without_cleanup():
    rule_id = "tempfile_without_cleanup"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Temporary files or directories created without a visible cleanup or context-manager ownership path."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
